marketplace: NASA OCIO API-First Data Marketplace (synthetic POC)

products.title: Artemis Supply-Chain Risk API
products.description: Zero-move, governed access to the synthetic Artemis SAP procurement system of record (vendors, materials, purchase orders, derived supply risk). Data never leaves Postgres; every call is brokered, authenticated, and metered by the gateway.
products.data_source: PostgreSQL (SAP-shaped) via Microsoft Data API Builder (auto REST + GraphQL + OpenAPI)
products.data_sensitivity_banner: SYNTHETIC — not real NASA procurement data. ITAR/CUI-safe.
products.auth: OAuth2 bearer (RS256 JWT) validated at the Kong gateway

sample_query.question: Which Critical, sole-source materials on Artemis-3 have an average delay > 30 days?
sample_query.odata: $filter=program eq 'Artemis-3' and criticality eq 'Critical' and sole_source eq true and avg_delay_days gt 30&$orderby=risk_score desc
